# cairn vault remove

Remove a vault from the registry (does not delete files)

## Help

```text
Remove a vault from the registry (does not delete files)

Usage: remove [OPTIONS] <NAME>

Arguments:
  <NAME>
          Name of the vault to remove

Options:
      --json
          Emit JSON output

  -h, --help
          Print help
```
